entities.name: Vrijen Attawar
entities.context: Author of the position on soft skills in an AI world

entities.name: Soft Skills
entities.context: Human interpersonal skills that become more valuable as AI handles technical output

entities.name: AI Automation
entities.context: Domain of the position; AI handling technical output and replicating technical tasks

entities.name: Problem Decomposition
entities.context: A soft skill example — breaking problems into parts, valued in human collaboration

entities.name: Facilitation
entities.context: A soft skill example — guiding group processes and discussions

entities.name: Human Collaboration
entities.context: Genuine teamwork and helping teammates that AI cannot replicate

entities.name: Leadership
entities.context: Human leadership capability that AI cannot replicate

entities.name: Technical Skills Commoditization
entities.context: Risk that people who double down on AI-replicable technical skills will be commoditized

entities.name: Competitive Advantage
entities.context: Shifts from technical output to soft skills in an AI-augmented world

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company; this position aligns with his career coaching domain expertise

relationships.context: Believes soft skills become more valuable as AI handles technical output
Believes AI can match or exceed human performance on many technical tasks
Soft skills are where competitive advantage shifts in an AI world
Problem decomposition is an example of a valued soft skill
Facilitation is an example of a valued soft skill
Collaboration and helping teammates are core soft skills AI cannot replicate
Leadership is an irreplaceable human skill alongside soft skills
AI replicating technical skills drives commoditization of people who rely solely on them
Believes those who only develop AI-replicable technical skills will be commoditized
Founder of Careerspan; this position reflects his career coaching expertise
